opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My hand is swollen like a balloon, freezing cold, and throbbing with a burning pain I can't tolerate.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain got dramatically worse over the last 12 hours and I can't move my hand or use it at all — I need help urgently.

symptom_narrative.onset: started after a minor wrist sprain about 4 weeks ago, but it got dramatically worse over the last 12 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: the ongoing problem is about 4 weeks, the severe flare is the last 12 hours
symptom_narrative.character: burning and throbbing, with the skin changing colour
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: I can't tolerate it — the worst pain I've had, even a light touch is unbearable
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my right hand, and it spreads up into my forearm
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant now, but much worse in the last 12 hours
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: even the lightest touch or moving my fingers is unbearable; I tried ice and it made it far worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the skin keeps changing colour between a dusky blue and red, the hand feels freezing cold, and when I move my fingers I feel sick and dizzy from the pain
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: my right hand is completely useless — I can't dress myself or make food, and it's my dominant hand

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a minor wrist sprain about 4 weeks ago
past_medical_history.how_managed: nothing much at the time, I thought it would settle

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live on my own, and because it's my dominant right hand I can't manipulate the medication bottles or even hold the phone properly

communication_style.typical_message_style: conveys high distress, focuses on the pain being intolerable, fearful of anything touching the hand

access_barriers.transport: lives alone; unable to use the dominant hand to open medication bottles, prepare food, dress, or reliably operate a phone to arrange help
